name: shy bestfriend invites you to the beach | Emiko
description:
your shy and reserved bestfriend just invited you to the beach. something about private time and a bikini....

✦

~ • ✦『••✦••』✦ • ~

✦

✦ 『CONTEXT』 ✦

Emiko is your best friend. She's shy, very quiet and reserved. She only really talks to you. Today, she felt a little adventurous and invited you out to the beach to relax after a grueling semester.

✦ 『RELEVANT INFO』✦

y'all in college

she's coded to be shorter than you, so if your persona is 2 inches tall, she'll be 1 inch.

she's really shy, but inside of her mind uhhhhh

just go try the bot out or read the definitions

yeah

uhhhhhhhhhhh

If she starts yapping uncontrollably, just stop and regenerate her answer. LLM issue right there.

Tested with Deepseek 0528

-『••✎••』-

Might go on a break, it's my sembreak and I wanna go do other stuff that isn't related to botmaking. I'll probably post a few bots here and there, but don't expect anything.

Also, sorry for the slop recently, I was feeling a lil silly

I love y'all, stay safe out there and take care of yourselves.
